programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Angry Abnormal Atrocities of the Astute Animal Agressors
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Problematic Pandemonium of the Punishing Plungerina
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Blitzkrieg of the Bothersome Butt-erflies
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Dastardlys Deed of the Devious Diddlysaurus
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: It's Purrsday!
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Ty And Revvit
programme.desc: Meet Ty Rux and his buddy Revvit as they join forces with the giant Dinotrux team that are half dinosaur, half construction truck and full-on fun!

programme.title: The Palomino Family Affair
programme.desc: Lucky and Bebe spend the weekend pretending to be besties when their fathers come for a family visit and reveal that they're old friends.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Flustering Mindless Woe of the Flushable Memory Wipes
programme.desc: After being made fun of for sitting in chocolate pudding, George and Harold go into hiding only to come back to find that everybody has forgotten who they are

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Soggy Salvation of the Swirling Sweatnami
programme.desc: Tired of mean Mr. Krupp, the boys go back in time to prevent him from becoming a bully, but discover that their plan has backfired when they return to the present

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Sickening Fumes of Smartsy Fartsy
programme.desc: In order to retrieve Mr. Krupp’s locked up rule book, George and Harold use an invention that ends up turning against them

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 1
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 2
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: The Liar and The Thief
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Cupcake Tree
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: The Fairy Festival!
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Game Plan
programme.desc: Boss tries to rename the local soccer team to "The Babies", but after Danny gets involved in the popularity race with his name, "The Hot Dogs", the town becomes divided. Boss creates a crack team of Baby Corp employees to game plan solutions to the worst outcomes.

programme.title: Night Owls
programme.desc: Boss arranges a sleepover with Quiet Psycho Baby to get access to her father the Mayor's day planner, hoping to plant his own pro-baby agenda. However, staying up all night has the unexpected consequence of delusional over-tiredness! Tim sneaks into an art film and decides he has to be a grown-up now, so Mom and Dad try to "kid" him up again.

programme.title: OCB
programme.desc: Boss' reign as CEO is threatened by a charming, multiple-dimpled Outside Consultant Baby (OCB) hired by the Board of Directors. Boss, furious that OCB will ruin Baby Corp with his poorly thought out ideas, tries to distract him while Staci adds the finishing touches to a project that will make OCB unnecessary, The 24 Hour Diaper.

programme.title: Captain Underpants And The Senseless Torment Of The Space Toilet
programme.desc: Inspired by their favorite TV show, George and Harold - along with Principal Krupp - blast off to outer space, where an angry toilet awaits.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Abandoned Artifact of the Absentee Aliens
programme.desc: After George and Harold learn the truth about their mission, Dupe Licitous enlists the entire crew in a quest to repair a rogue satellite.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Hazardous Hysteria of the Hangry Hypnosinger
programme.desc: Everybody on the spaceship has been cryogenically frozen for three months - everyone, that is, except Krupp, who's wide awake and happily in charge.

programme.title: An Echo of Nowhere
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: The Patroness
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Tchau, Uggos
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Confounding Concoction of the Crooked Combotato
programme.desc: A fierce game of plot potato takes an unexpected twist when Melvin unleashes one of his most fiendish -- and carb-loaded -- creations yet.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Angry Abnormal Atrocities of the Astute Animal Agressors
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Problematic Pandemonium of the Punishing Plungerina
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Blitzkrieg of the Bothersome Butt-erflies
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Dastardlys Deed of the Devious Diddlysaurus
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: The Intruder Flies a Crooked Path
programme.desc: When Jindiao arrives to the Village, he invites the kids to participate in an exhibition match, but has alternative motives

programme.title: The Arcadian Job
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.

programme.title: 裸血
programme.desc: 凌波的丈夫高远及其友王侠，均与肚皮舞女郎孟莉有染，孟藉此勒索二人；后孟被杀，高成嫌疑犯，另孟之兄翟诺，亦向高勒索；而凌在家，也接见了谷峰，他声言有为高洗罪的证据，但要索钱；王妻李香君借贷给凌... 究竟谁是杀孟真凶？

programme.title: 六指琴魔
programme.desc: 女侠风灵得悉"六弦魔琴"重现江湖，唯一能克制魔琴的只有火弦弓及火羽箭，唯袖手樵隐知其下落；风找得群雄一起找樵；期间，众人发现逍遥隐士就是六指琴魔...

programme.title: 后门
programme.desc: 本片由著名文学家徐吁的小说《后门》改编，故事讲述徐天鹤与太太结婚多年，膝下犹虚，对隔壁小女孩阿琳甚有好感。阿琳父母离婚，孤苦伶仃，徐太太提议收阿琳为继女，琳父母喜不自胜。后来阿琳亲母史小姐出现，要接回阿琳；徐太太不忍拆散母女骨肉，毅然将阿琳交回亲母。

programme.title: 神通术与小霸王
programme.desc: 三国时代，道士于吉凭藉精妙的道术医好无数病人，深受百姓爱戴。不料，「小霸王」孙策认为于吉妖言惑众，遂下令把他斩首。怎料于吉练成道术，被斩后，他的元神脱体飞出并向孙策报复。

programme.title: 血手印
programme.desc: 穷书生林肇德与富翁的女儿订亲，但富翁却因肇德家道中落，反对婚事。肇德为迎娶其女儿，决定要上京考取功名。上京赴考前，肇德去见未婚妻，怎料却碰上婢女满身鲜血伏尸后花园。因不慎留下血手印于门上，他更被诬陷杀人。究竟包公最后如何为他洗脱冤情?

programme.title: 天涯明月刀
programme.desc: 电影讲述傅红雪为了应付势力庞大的阴谋家公子羽，除了力敌对方的爪牙，亦要智破对方的诡计。凭藉出色的武打设计、华丽的布景、唯美的拍摄技巧及强劲的演员阵容，《天涯明月刀》在武侠电影的历史上创下高锋。

programme.title: 城市之光
programme.desc: 导演张坚庭在本片体现香港八十年代的大城小景；陈友与妻子惠英红从大陆来港投靠父亲，却发现他并非如信中所言生活富足。东方之珠的美梦换来悲喜交集。

programme.title: 残缺
programme.desc: 庄主杜天道其子被人斩去双臂，性格变得暴戾。无故地先后打伤四人致残。四人成残缺一族，走投无路，入深山找师父授以武功，立志报仇...

programme.title: 红楼梦
programme.desc: 这部电影改编自中国史上最广受欢迎的文学作品《红楼梦》，被誉为同名电影中最成功的作品。乐蒂生动地诠释了美丽却带有一丝哀愁的林黛玉角色，也因此赢得了「古典美人」的美誉。

programme.title: 神打
programme.desc: 浪迹江湖的汪禹，因被揭以木刀伪装刀枪不入，而被村民群起而追。汪脱身回客栈后，发觉师傅江洋已被捕；数警察亦要抓汪，但汪已逃到另一村镇；汪为抱打不平，又在众人前显露神打功夫，乘天将下雨，自谓是东海龙王化身，跳入河中隐身而去，未几，果然大雨如注，众人真以为有神灵出现。后汪遇恍如男孩的少女林珍奇，引为知己，同闯江湖...

programme.title: 貂蝉
programme.desc: 汉朝末年太师董卓霸道专横，弄权祸国，忠臣王允誓要利用貂蝉的美色设计除掉董卓。王允得知董卓的义子吕布见貂蝉貌若天仙一见钟情，于是将计就计把貂蝉献给董卓为妾，终使父子反目。吕布最后杀了父亲董卓，自此与貂蝉成为眷属。

programme.title: 神刀
programme.desc: 神刀大侠临终时，把神刀传给了徒弟林振啸，而且更识破了另一徒弟方世雄为夺神刀而混入门下的奸计。方世雄为了神刀，令林家破人亡和双目失明。最后，林振啸与方世雄大战为家人报仇，并誓要重夺神刀...

programme.title: 乾隆皇与三姑娘
programme.desc: 乾隆皇爱慕苏州名妓三姑娘，为了朝夕幽会，竟然在青楼挖了一条地下通道直达紫禁城。青楼内外，乾隆神出鬼没，吓破臣下的胆子。乾隆在民间行侠仗义，更在赌坊大破赌局。

programme.title: UEFA Youth League 2025/26: PSG vs HJK Helsinki - R16
programme.desc: The UEFA Youth League is an annual football competition contested by the youth teams (U19) of the clubs competing in the UCL group stage, plus the domestic youth champions of the best-ranked national associations

programme.title: Porsche Carrera Cup Germany 2026: Imola Race 2 (Live)
programme.desc: The Porsche Carrera Cup Deutschland is a mainstay among Europea€™s one-make cups. More than a launchpad for emerging talent, the Carrera Cup is a thrilling battleground in its own right.

programme.title: April
programme.desc: Thrilling racing from the most demanding events around the globe, Gearing Up heads to the toughest events and gets on-board with the sport's heroic drivers.

programme.title: Rally Croatia
programme.desc: Enjoy highlights from the 54th season of the World Rally Championship

programme.title: FIA World Endurance Championship 2026: 6 Hours of Imola, ITA Part 1 (Live)
programme.desc: The premier international motorsport racing series, featuring long-distance races contested by elite drivers and multiple manufacturers.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十集 我得知道，我在一个什么样的地狱里 罗曼被派去急诊室要一份拍摄许可，抬头见到周慕孙。他打羽毛球扭到腰。两人四目，周慕孙还想叙旧，罗曼拉着路过方驰救场。方驰熟练询问病情，在周慕孙的腰上触诊便开了药。周慕孙行动不便，罗曼本着善意帮他交费拿药，还送他上车，无视方驰。直到方驰赌气不跟罗曼吃夜宵。罗曼觉着他和方驰的关系变化了，在KTV拍摄，节目组安排方驰和刘怡然抄CP，罗曼越看越不是滋味。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十一集 选北京的一套房，还是一个人 家里老人寄错地址，一双给新生儿的虎头鞋，让陈凯西第一次情绪失控，说出离婚。陈勉把责任推到前助理身上，保证处理好一切。接着不惜血本，陈凯西老家拆迁，亲戚跟陈父争房，陈勉就给送了一套，赢得岳父岳母称赞。稳住后方，陈勉心情大好约了羽毛球局，却发现方驰对周慕孙有敌意，周慕孙点出小孩跟罗曼动了情。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十集 我得知道，我在一个什么样的地狱里 罗曼被派去急诊室要一份拍摄许可，抬头见到周慕孙。他打羽毛球扭到腰。两人四目，周慕孙还想叙旧，罗曼拉着路过方驰救场。方驰熟练询问病情，在周慕孙的腰上触诊便开了药。周慕孙行动不便，罗曼本着善意帮他交费拿药，还送他上车，无视方驰。直到方驰赌气不跟罗曼吃夜宵。罗曼觉着他和方驰的关系变化了，在KTV拍摄，节目组安排方驰和刘怡然抄CP，罗曼越看越不是滋味。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十一集 选北京的一套房，还是一个人 家里老人寄错地址，一双给新生儿的虎头鞋，让陈凯西第一次情绪失控，说出离婚。陈勉把责任推到前助理身上，保证处理好一切。接着不惜血本，陈凯西老家拆迁，亲戚跟陈父争房，陈勉就给送了一套，赢得岳父岳母称赞。稳住后方，陈勉心情大好约了羽毛球局，却发现方驰对周慕孙有敌意，周慕孙点出小孩跟罗曼动了情。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: Sweet Suspensions
programme.desc: The final four use their chocolate and confectionary skills to create a delectable trifle terrarium; with one elimination challenge before the finale, the bakers must create a three-tiered suspended cake.

programme.title: A Tale of Three Bakers
programme.desc: The home bakers are tasked with telling their baking story through four delectable dessert chapters; one baker walks away with the $50,000 grand prize and the title of Great Chocolate Showdown Champion.

programme.title: Let The Games Begin!
programme.desc: Ten home bakers enter the kitchen and are tasked with creating a chocolate Tic Tac Toe board. In the Elimination Challenge, the bakers set a scrumptious scene by delivering a cake diorama.

programme.title: Think Outside the Bar
programme.desc: The remaining nine bakers must think beyond the bar as they create a nougat-filled chocolate confection in a surprising shape; the bakers aim to please in the elimination challenge with a dessert that pairs chocolate with cheese.

programme.title: Pie Society
programme.desc: Eight home bakers must make pies with a decorative crust; the bakers flex their flavour muscles in the elimination challenge by creating a dessert that showcases one of the major taste sensations.

programme.title: Best Fruit Forward
programme.desc: The home bakers bejewel a chocolate sculpture; the bakers create an appealing entremets that replicates a piece of fruit.

programme.title: World of Flavor
programme.desc: With the immunity off the table, the top six bakers pair up to build a magnificent meringue tower; after receiving a postcard from home, the bakers embark on a sweet journey and deliver a dessert showcasing an international ingredient.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Chocolate!

programme.title: RBC Heritage Round 3
programme.desc: The Heritage is South Carolina's only signature event on the PGA TOUR. It was first played 56 years ago in 1969. The venue for its entire existence has been the Harbour Town Golf Links at the Sea Pines Resort on Hilton Head Island. The original purse of USD$100,000 (USD$770,000 in today’s dollars) has jumped to USD$20 million.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) Final
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 霹雳先锋
programme.desc: 张铁柱是一名出色的警长，他刚烈的办案风格却遭到上司和同僚的不满。当他意外发现偷车贼伟仔为追捕持枪劫匪的关键人物，两人不得不携手将罪犯绳之以法。

programme.title: 替枪老豆
programme.desc: 万与夏婚后多年忽想生育，但万被证实不育，让夏接受人工受孕；但万心中仍感怪异，内心矛盾弄得精神紧张，行为乖张，闹出不少笑话；万在夏平安产子前后，屡有奇异幻想，误会连场，猜疑甚多，更怀疑夏与任职于夏威夷精子银行的表哥潘震伟有染，不是人工受孕，而是被人受孕。

programme.title: 烈探
programme.desc: 警探张荼为救落入人贩之手的儿子，不惜孤身深入敌穴，跨国追击，但却被牵扯进大型儿童拐卖案。在寻找儿子的过程中，他和身份神秘的女子携手捣毁了一个大型国际犯罪集团，上演了一场惊心动魄的绝地生死营救。

programme.title: 白蛇传说
programme.desc: 这部奇幻动作片改编自中国经典传说《白蛇传》，讲述郎中许仙爱上化身为女子的千年白蛇。白蛇的真实身份被揭露后，高僧法海为守护人类与超自然力量之间的平衡，不得不挺身而出，展开一场惊心动魄的对决。

programme.title: 九龙城寨
programme.desc: 曾是东北街头武霸的阿能为了出人头地，洗心革面来到香港的九龙城寨从零开始打拼，不料却卷入一场黑恶势力间的阴谋和混战。最终为保护被黑恶势力追杀的好朋友，阿能重拾自我，挺身而出，与城寨居民一同对抗黑恶势力，誓死保卫朋友。

programme.title: 封口者
programme.desc: 罗雪与男友吵架后，出走来到深山民宿与伊伊成为合租室友。一晚，罗雪无意中撞破依依及其友人雷松杀死依依的前男友。为免走漏消息，他们囚禁罗雪于阁楼中。罗雪的知己苏文发现她失踪后，到处找寻她的下落。最后，罗雪及苏文能否成功逃出险境?

programme.title: 三十处男
programme.desc: 设计师赵宇庭被批算三十岁前结婚，会被妻子克死，赵父遂严禁赵宇庭结交异性。但限期将届，他急不及待觅对象。荔玲与母亲同为死人化妆师，为了交男友改为新娘化妆，此时她认识了赵宇庭...

programme.title: 僵尸叔叔
programme.desc: 偏僻山间，一僧一道比邻而居。和尚（午马 饰）随和开朗，更有一女徒菁菁（李丽珍 饰）玲珑可爱；道士（陈友 饰）古板严厉，而徒弟嘉乐（钱嘉乐 饰）却鬼马顽皮。性格不同的两个师傅口角不断，大斗其法，两个冤家徒弟也搞笑连连，笑料频出。

programme.title: 赤脚小子
programme.desc: 穷乡青年关丰曜，终日赤着双脚，以背人过河为活。关父临终前，嘱其出城投靠段青云；段骤见故人之子，留下关在布店当小工。关与私塾女教师华小莲交心，却遭莲父白眼；关为求出人头地，竟往投靠土霸喀和布，结果连累莲父与段相继被喀暗算身亡。关得知真相，惜为时已晚，追悔莫及，决与喀拼过死活...

programme.title: 逃学威龙 2
programme.desc: 周星星遭降职后愤而辞去警职，私自潜入一所国际学校，调查国际恐怖分子的阴谋。期间，他意外发现探员达叔正假扮成教师。两人随即联手，共同对抗全副武装的罪犯，展开一场终极对决。

programme.title: 千王斗千霸
programme.desc: 一位名震千坛的千王之王及其伙伴被政府雇用，以调查一名赌术了得的上海大亨。当局怀疑他藉开赌场掩饰其在上海情报机关的日本千霸身份。

programme.title: 师兄撞鬼
programme.desc: 该片描述董骠调查制造毒品案，却惨死在毒贩枪下。董骠化做鬼魂回警察局，借警员周星驰之手查清杀己的凶手。冯淬帆和周星驰在茅山老祖的指导下利用灵药合力斗败邪恶法师，枪毙邓公子，为董骠报了仇，使他能安心上天堂。

programme.title: 精武风云 - 陈真
programme.desc: 1920年代的上海，陈真以年轻实业家身份潜伏，欲揭露黑社会头目与日军的勾结。他不仅要取得头目的信任，还需应对日军将领麾下杀手的重重狙杀。为隐匿行迹，他戴起黑色面具，联手警局队长，以威猛铁拳守护这座城市的爱国志士。

programme.title: 风雨同路
programme.desc: 卧底探员张郎奉命接近前黑帮大哥李云飞，调查冷血匪帮首领大傻所涉及的钻石劫案，并借机套取线报。当交易出现意外后，钻石落入李云飞手中，大傻决心将两人置于死地。张郎与李云飞被迫联手反击。

programme.title: Saab 900
programme.desc: Mike thinks there's money to be made on a soft-top Saab 900, but with a dicey clutch and woolly steering, Elvis has concerns. Can they get it back to its best?

programme.title: The Verdict
programme.desc: Experts debate the cause of John's injuries, and closing arguments begin. Karen anxiously awaits her fate, and the jury delivers an unexpected note.

programme.title: Shark Week: Off The Hook (S1)
programme.desc: It's time to dive deep into the ocean and get up close and personal with one of the world's deadliest predators and explore their secret lives.

programme.title: On The Menu
programme.desc: Stranded in the South African bush, Joe and Cody fight to get out alive while hiding from poachers who may be hunting them.

programme.title: Dakota's Sanatorium Of Death
programme.desc: The Ghost Adventures crew visits a North Dakota sanatorium with a history of over 1,000 deaths.

programme.title: Blood Red Redemption
programme.desc: A repeat client has a wild request. When Joe changes how sales calls are handled, Ashley's family revolts. Can she quell the rebellion?

programme.title: Fab Four And A Big Score
programme.desc: A police officer's house is packed with Beatles records, fishing gear and guns. Sports jerseys have taken over a family home. Sales top $100,000!

programme.title: Eagle Hunt In Mongolia - In The Footsteps Of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: In the remote Altai Mountains, Otto Karasch learns how to hunt birds of prey. He and his companion must find suitable mounts for their daring journey.

programme.title: Lost Treasures
programme.desc: What became of the Amber Room stolen by Nazis, a hard drive holding billions in Bitcoin lost in a landfill, and the mysterious mines of King Solomon?

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: The Kingmaker Claim
programme.desc: Jared and crew race against time to move enough wood to water to win the Holy Grail of logging claims and secure Cypress Creek's legacy forever.

programme.title: Splash For Cash
programme.desc: Jared and crew race to maximize his bid for the Forever Claim and protect Cypress Creek's future from the competition.

programme.title: Raw Deal
programme.desc: Jared strikes a risky deal with a powerful businessman that will give him exclusive rights to the Forever Claim... if it doesn't bleed him dry first.

programme.title: Moving The Monster
programme.desc: Fallers grapple with gnarly timber, but Jared's company and first $100k royalty payment are in jeopardy if he can't wrestle a 140-ton beast uphill.

programme.title: Crash And Burn
programme.desc: Stretched thin and desperately off-pace, Jared watches a loader tumble down the road. Foreman Brad attempts to land his plane in choppy weather.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.desc: Myrna the Mynah bird leads her feathered friends astray and it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue the wayward flock. // Adventure Bay is holding a kids only soapbox derby race when a mysterious newcomer named ''Hum-Kid'' shows up and breaks the rules!

programme.desc: Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Hospital

programme.title: Spring
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig organises a chocolate egg hunt for Peppa and her friends. Will the piglets track down the treats?

programme.title: Miss Rabbit's Helicopter
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit takes Peppa and her family for a ride in her rescue helicopter.

programme.title: Digging Up the Road
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are trying to get to the playground, but Mr Bull's roadworks are in the way.

programme.title: Freddy Fox
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing hide and seek, but it is Freddy Fox with his super smelling nose who is the best at playing that game.

programme.title: Whistling
programme.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realizes that seemingly everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Snow
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the beach where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow!

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: Breakfast Bots
programme.desc: Can Robot Blaze stop the Breakfast Bots before they bury Axle City in breakfast?

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Observatory / The Crew Builds A Zipline

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。
